chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No. D- 2313 OF 2022 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________________ For order as to maintainability of instant petition. ------------ 31.08.2022. Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. ________ In response to order passed on 24.08.2022, Counsel does not press this Petition and submits that the Petitioner would avail alternate remedy under the Sindh Irrigation and Drainage Authority Ordinance, 2002 read with Judgment of the Honourable Supreme Court dated 24.03.2021 passed in Civil Appeals No.10-K to 17-K of 2019. Order accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz P.S.
